summary: Verified Shíntergy site rebuild: landing focused on Caterpillar 420F2 IT retroexcavadora, /terrenos subpage with 6 lots, modal with payment simulator, lead form, and Google Maps. All 7 backend pytest tests pass (root health, quote create day/week/month with correct IVA pricing 6728/36331.2/139200, persistence GET, list, 404). All key UI flows pass on desktop and mobile (390px).
passed_tests: GET /api/ root health -> 200
POST /api/quotes/create retroexcavadora day -> total 6728.00 (5800 + 16% IVA)
POST /api/quotes/create retroexcavadora week -> total 36331.20 (31320 + 16%)
POST /api/quotes/create retroexcavadora month -> total 139200.00 (120000 + 16%)
Quote persistence: POST then GET /api/quotes/{id} returns same data, no _id leak
GET /api/quotes list returns quotes array, no _id leak
GET /api/quotes/{nonexistent} returns 404
Landing hero H1 'Soluciones en construcción con respaldo profesional'
Hero CTA 'Ver maquinaria y precios' visible (data-testid hero-cta-cotizar)
Hero CTA 'Solicitar información' visible (data-testid hero-cta-whatsapp)
Phone '228 120 0243' visible on hero/page
Hero terrenos link visible with href='/terrenos' (data-testid hero-link-terrenos)
Maquinaria section shows Caterpillar / 420F2 IT / 2016 / Retroexcavadora 4x4
Prices: Día $5,800, Semana $31,320, Mes $120,000 with 'Mejor precio' badge
Carousel prev/next buttons functional (2 images)
¿Qué incluye? lists Operador 30+ años, Combustible Sí, Traslado incluido, Seguro
Three info cards visible: condiciones-card, requisitos-card, cobertura-card
All 12 cobertura zones present (Xalapa, Coatepec, San Marcos, Pacho, La Orduña, Briones, La Pitaya, El Grande, Puerto Rico, Las Lomas, Mundo Nuevo, Zimphizagua)
TerrenosCTA banner present on landing
Footer shows phone 228 120 0243 and 8:00 horario
Floating WhatsApp button present
/terrenos page: H1 'Terrenos con escrituras en Xalapa y región'
/terrenos shows all 6 expected terrenos (Valle de Niebla, Mirador La Cascada, Altavista Residencial, Bosques de Naolinco, Mirador del Bosque, Lomas de Emiliano Zapata)
Filters Todos/Destacados/Campestres/Habitacional present and clickable
Modal 'Ver detalles' opens with simulator, 2 sliders (enganche/plazo), lead form (Nombre input), Google Maps iframe
Mensualidad estimada updates (e.g. $11,229 for 30%/24 meses on $385,000)
Hero terrenos link navigates to /terrenos correctly (mobile 390px)
Volver al inicio button on /terrenos navigates back to /
Mobile responsive at 390px: hero, CTA, navigation, terrenos cards all render
critical_code_review_comments: PRICING dict in server.py correctly updated to retroexcavadora day/week/month 5800/31320/120000.
MongoDB _id correctly excluded in GET /api/quotes/{id} and /api/quotes (verified in tests).
Email service may not deliver to non-verified addresses (Resend test mode); expected per problem statement.
Minor: PRICING values for gps/airtag/seguro_extra are 0 — fine for retroexcavadora-only flow but means additional_services have no price impact.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Test quotes created via POST during pytest (TEST_ prefix). Not cleaned up; existing /api/quotes list has 7+ records.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_quotes_retro.py covers full quote lifecycle for retroexcavadora. Frontend public URL: https://land-sales-pro.preview.emergentagent.com. Two routes: / (Home) and /terrenos (TerrenosPage). All key elements have data-testid: hero-cta-cotizar, hero-cta-whatsapp, hero-link-terrenos, machine-prev, machine-next, machine-whatsapp, machine-cotizar, precio-dia/semana/mes, condiciones-card, requisitos-card, cobertura-card.
